problem: What is the least positive integer that can be added to 412 to yield a multiple of 3?

classified_questions.question: Can you restate the problem in your own words?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: What is the remainder when 412 is divided by 3? How does this relate to finding the least positive integer to add to 412 to yield a multiple of 3?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: How can you use the remainder to determine the necessary amount to add to 412 to make it a multiple of 3?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Are there any restrictions on the possible integer you can add to 412 to make it a multiple of 3? If so, what are they?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How would the problem change if we asked for the least positive integer to subtract from 412 to yield a multiple of 3? Can the same approach be used to solve this new problem?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can you think of other problems involving multiples and remainders that can be solved using similar methods?
classified_questions.label: e
